name: vwStudentMinor
SQL: CREATE VIEW vwStudentMinor AS SELECT s.StuID, s.Major, m.DNO FROM Student s JOIN Minor_in m ON s.StuID = m.StuID;

name: vwStudentAdvisor
SQL: CREATE VIEW vwStudentAdvisor AS SELECT s.StuID, s.Major, s.Advisor FROM Student s;

name: vwStudentMoreInfo
SQL: CREATE VIEW vwStudentMoreInfo AS SELECT s.StuID, s.Age, m.DNO, m.Appt_Type FROM Student s JOIN Enrolled_in e ON s.StuID = e.StuID JOIN Member_of m ON s.StuID = m.StuID;

name: vwStudentCourse
SQL: CREATE VIEW vwStudentCourse AS SELECT s.StuID, s.Major, c.CID, c.DNO FROM Student s JOIN Enrolled_in e ON s.StuID = e.StuID JOIN Course c ON e.CID = c.CID;
